IRouteVerbPermissionProviderGetPermission Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the permission for the specified verb.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Security
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
IRequestPermission GetPermission(
	string appId,
	string url,
	string verb
)

Parameters

appId
Type: SystemString
url
Type: SystemString
verb
Type: SystemString

Return Value

Type: IRequestPermission
The registered permission, or an invariant permission if none was registered.
